rulings.Case Title: CLARICE PRINCE TRUST UDT ESTABLISHED JUNE 30, 2009
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Petition
rulings.Rulings: The Court has reviewed Respondent's Points and Authorities in Opposition to Motion for Leave to File First Amended Petition even thought it was untimely filed. CCP§ 1005(b). Given the general policy to liberally permit amendment of the pleadings, Petitioners' Motion for Leave to File First Amended Petition is herby granted. Nestle v. Santa Monica (1972) 6 Cal.3d 920, at 939; Howard v. County of San Diego (2010) 184 Cal.App.4th 1422, 1428. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on July 10, 2013. If the tentative ruling is not argued, it will become the order of the court. Prevailing party to prepare the order. .
